fixture: 013_projection_aliases

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE accounts (id INTEGER NOT NULL, balance INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO accounts VALUES (1, 100)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO accounts VALUES (2, 250)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id AS account_id, balance AS current_balance FROM accounts
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] account_id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] current_balance INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 100
      [1] 2 | 250

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT balance - 10 AS after_fee FROM accounts
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] after_fee INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 90
      [1] 240
